The '''LX-2 [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] mine''' was a command-detonating perimeter [[Mine/Legends|mine]]. The mine was designed to be detonated by a secret comm code, which could also be used to disable it for removal. In an embarrassing incident on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Calonica]], a spot inspection of the more than 50,000 LX-2 mines buried around the capital found over 90 percent of them had been rendered harmless. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Spy/Legends|spies]] had discovered the secret code and used it to disable the mines, removed their explosive charges, and put the mines back in the ground. This incident resulted in the production of the [[LX-4 proton mine/Legends|LX-4 proton mine]], which could not be disarmed except through detonation.
